scripts.release:zip: npm run build:dist && npm run verify:dist && node tools/create-release-archive.mjs
scripts.release:manual-cloudflare: npm run check && npm run release:zip
scripts.check: npm run build:shell:check && npm run verify:architecture && npm run typecheck && npm run verify:pages-functions && npm run verify:content-client && npm run verify:content-observability && npm run verify:content-refresh && npm run verify:d1-foundation && npm run verify:admin-auth && npm run verify:d1-write-helper
scripts.ready:local: npm run check && npm run verify:repo-readiness
